title: cyperus vestitus
intro: Cyperus vestitus, also known as the Lesser Umbrella Sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus vestitus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
